title: Broken Sandbox
description: Makes the game way too easy.
body:
Ever had difficulty beating the game? This mod is for you.
I originally made this cause my brother was always unable to beat the game,
so he begged me to make a mod that makes it easy.

...

Well...

I made it easy. Way too easy in my opinion.

What it does:

*__Try putting 1 dirt in a crafting table.__*

It will give you full unbreakable netherite gear with lvl 10 plus enchantments,
A stack of enchanted golden apples, totems of undying, and eyes of ender.

As you can see, this breaks the game instantly and makes the player almost unkillable.
It basically functions like a data pack, but in mod form so you don't have to install it
on each world separately. It does require [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org), or [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) to run however.

No dependencies other than the launcher you are using's respective api? Haven't tested without the api so it might not run without it.

Should be stable. Runs on vanilla functions? It's basically just a data pack that has been reformatted to a mod.

Must be on a server. Optional on client.
